Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0701
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you hear? The next operation will be on July 7th.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}That means it's going to be a Star Festival special bout.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0704
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}You probably already know this, but the next full moon will be on Tuesday of next week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure some kind of Shadow will show up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0706
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we lose, the city gets overrun with the Lost, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}We gotta win this, no matter what...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Yo, let's go to Tartarus tonight. We can beat some Shadows to a pulp to brush up our skills![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0706
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we lose, the city gets overrun with the Lost, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}We gotta win this, no matter what...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}You down for hitting Tartarus later? I wanna pack on some muscle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0706
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we lose, the city gets overrun with the Lost, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}We gotta win this, no matter what. We're the peacekeepers of this here town! ...Just kidding.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, we oughta get in gear. If you're goin' to Tartarus today, count me in![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_0706
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}For tomorrow, I think I'll have you stand by at the dorm just in case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}So if there are preparations you need to make, please take care of them today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0708
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, I need to talk to Fuuka...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0708_RE1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}Oh, um, there's something I have to clear up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0708_RE2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1092 0 0}Um... I'm feelin' kinda tired today, so I'd rather not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0708
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}I'm sure you're burnt out coming right off an operation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know, it might do you good to just rest today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_STUDY_0709
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's plenty of time until the next full moon, and while I wish I could tell you to take it slow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Finals start next week, so I'd like you to care for your health and concentrate on your studies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARII_STUDY_0710
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, are you free tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}With exams coming up, I thought maybe we second-years could hold a study session...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_STUDY_0710_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Pass. I'm headin' to my room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARII_STUDY_0710_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh well, his loss. You, me, and Fuuka can still study together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_0718
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That antique shop in Paulownia Mall...[n]The chairman suggested I pay them a visit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll head over there now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0723
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}It seemed to take forever to get back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0723
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Please rest up so you're ready for the next operation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0723
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}There are six more to fight, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just the last full moon Shadows and things will go back to normal. No more Apathy Syndrome incidents, just plain, old, everyday life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Let's do our best! After all, we're the only ones who can help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_0724_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, how'd you fare on your exams?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_0724_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}That's great news! I'm happy for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_0724_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, it is still just the first semester... You'll be all right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_0724_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}That reminds me, Kirijo-senpai was top of her class again![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, where does she find the time? She's unreal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_0724_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6001 0 0}...In two weeks, the moon will be full again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0724_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2061 0 0}Dude, those freaks with Apathy Syndrome will be everywhere— Wait, I mean the Lost.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I feel bad for the victims and all, but seriously, it's like there's no end to 'em![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_0724_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6037 0 0}Technically speaking, there is an end to them: six Shadows remain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}If we can eliminate them, the Dark Hour will vanish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0724_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, what you're trying to say, Aigis, is that fighting is more important than studying, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_0725
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}My name is Ken Amada. I'll be staying here for a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я намагатимусь не заважати, тому, будь ласка, не звертайте на мене уваги.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_0726
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Come to think of it, have you heard about {f 0 1 2}Be Blue V{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's this shop in Paulownia Mall, but there's a rumor you can talk to spirits there![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sounds a little sketchy, huh? I wonder what kind of shop it is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0727_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, that's right, didn't you have training today? How'd it go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0727_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Oh, yeah? You're tougher than I thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0727_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2094 0 0}Well, don't push yourself too hard, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0727
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, if you think you can handle it, let's go to Tartarus tonight![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a little less than two weeks 'til the full moon, so I kinda wanna hit the bullpen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0727_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, if you think you can handle it, let's go to Tartarus tonight![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's a little less than two weeks 'til the full moon. Gotta get that conditioning in, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0727_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, as long as you're off the injury list...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're coming up on just under two weeks 'til the full moon, so don't go getting hurt, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_072
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Apathy Syndrome is on the rise again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}People seem to have calmed down a bit, despite the media, but there will be serious problems if we don't end this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We must defeat the last six Shadows, beginning with the one we anticipate on the next full moon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If the number of the Lost continues to increase, this city will fall into chaos.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0728
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2098 0 0}Y-You're just exaggerating, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0729
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The others aren't back yet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kirijo-senpai said they'd be here by midnight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Maybe we shouldn't go to Tartarus today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0730
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}One more week 'til the moon is full again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You seen how things look at Paulownia Mall lately? The Lost are really on the rise...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I feel like it's really on us to do something about this now. Let's wipe the floor with these Shadows![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0731
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Hey... Doesn't it seem like there's a lot more of the Lost than before?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}There were quite a few in the city today. They were making my friend really anxious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* When's the next full moon again, next week? We really have to bring our A game, don't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
